label: Scattered prefabs
description: A group of prefabs scattered around a generated structure.

prefabs.label: Prefabs
prefabs.description: Weighted prefab entries. Each element name is the PrefabDef defName; scalar text is the weight.

countPer10kCellsRange.label: Count per 10k cells range
countPer10kCellsRange.description: How many scatter attempts per 10,000 map cells.

minSpacing.label: Min spacing
minSpacing.description: Minimum distance in cells between scattered prefab instances.

maxDistFromStructure.label: Max dist from structure
maxDistFromStructure.description: Maximum distance from the main structure that prefabs can be placed.
